headline: A Look At Becton Dickinson (BDX) Valuation As Revenue Outlook And Growth Challenges Raise Questions
summary: Why the recent revenue outlook is drawing attention Recent commentary around Becton Dickinson (BDX) has focused on an expected 12% revenue decline over the next year and sales growth over five years that trails healthcare peers. See our latest analysis for Becton Dickinson. BDX shares have been under pressure, with a 30 day share price return of 12.45% and a 90 day share price return of 20.83%, contributing to a 1 year total shareholder return of 11.55% and signaling fading momentum as...
